assertions.title: Bottom tab bar frosted glass / elevated styling

steps.action: Navigate to home page after login
steps.observed: Bottom tab bar visible with 5 tabs
backdrop-filter: blur(24px), background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8), border-t border-gray-200/50
Frosted glass effect with translucent white background and blur

steps.action: Observe active tab on Goods page
steps.observed: Primary-colored bar at top of active tab with layoutId animation
Indicator smoothly transitions using spring animation (stiffness: 380, damping: 30)
Active icon scales with duration: 0.2 (200ms), indicator uses spring animation

evidence.codeEvidence: BottomTabNavigation.tsx: layoutId='activeTabIndicator' with spring transition, m.div animate={{ scale: active ? 1 : 0.9 }} transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}

assertions.title: Page content entrance animation on route change

steps.observed: m.div with initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}

steps.expected: Content fades/slides in on each route change
steps.observed: Content fades in with slide-up effect, duration: 0.3 (300ms), easeOut

steps.action: Check animation applies to all routes
steps.expected: All tab routes and detail pages
steps.observed: template.tsx applies to all routes automatically via Next.js template pattern

evidence.codeEvidence: app/template.tsx: m.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3, ease: 'easeOut' }}

steps.action: grep for animate-spin in app/ and components/
steps.observed: Zero results — no spinner elements
components/ui/Skeleton.tsx with Skeleton, ProductCardSkeleton, MatchCardSkeleton
Imported in app/page.tsx, football/page.tsx, basketball/page.tsx, concert/page.tsx, products/[id]/page.tsx, events/[id]/page.tsx

evidence.codeEvidence: rg 'animate-spin' --glob '*.tsx' app/ components/ = 0 results. Skeleton imports found in 6 page files.

steps.expected: Product detail with Purchase/For Sale buttons
steps.observed: Product detail page with Go back, For sale, Purchase buttons

steps.expected: Modal slides up from bottom with backdrop fade
steps.observed: Modal appeared with slide-up animation, backdrop faded in
Panel: initial={{ y: '100%' }} animate={{ y: 0 }} with spring (damping: 25, stiffness: 300). Backdrop: opacity 0→1, duration: 0.2

steps.expected: Modal slides down, backdrop fades out
steps.observed: Modal dismissed with exit animation (y: '100%', opacity: 0)

evidence.codeEvidence: components/ui/AnimatedModal.tsx: Panel y:'100%'→0 (spring), Backdrop opacity:0→1 (0.2s), AnimatePresence for exit

steps.observed: Line 11: scroll-behavior: smooth;
window.getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).scrollBehavior = 'smooth'

evidence.codeEvidence: app/globals.css line 11: scroll-behavior: smooth; Browser computed style confirms scrollBehavior: 'smooth'

steps.observed: Active tab correctly shows 'My' when on /my, 'Goods' when on /, etc.

steps.action: Check tab bar hidden on product detail
steps.observed: nav element not present on /products/cmn6t892u0006l0t76vysahcl

steps.expected: Tab bar hidden on non-tab pages
steps.observed: hideBottomTabs: /login, /register, /admin/*, /products/*, /events/*

steps.action: Rapid-switch test (5 switches in quick succession)
steps.observed: All transitions completed smoothly during rapid switching

evidence.codeEvidence: LayoutWrapper.tsx: hideBottomTabs covers login, register, admin, products/*, events/*

steps.expected: AnimatePresence with cross-fade between skeleton and content
steps.observed: AnimatePresence mode='wait' wraps skeleton (exit: opacity 0, duration 0.2) and content (initial: opacity 0, animate: opacity 1, duration 0.3)

steps.expected: Skeleton placeholders fade out, content fades in
steps.observed: Smooth opacity transition from skeleton to content via AnimatePresence

steps.action: Navigate between pages to trigger re-loading
steps.observed: Consistent smooth transition on each navigation

evidence.codeEvidence: app/page.tsx: AnimatePresence mode='wait', skeleton exit={{ opacity: 0 }} duration 0.2, content initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} duration 0.3

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed. All UX core features verified: frosted glass tab bar with backdrop-blur, animated tab indicator with layoutId spring animation, page entrance animations via template.tsx, skeleton loaders replacing all spinners, modal slide-up animations, smooth scroll behavior, tab navigation persistence with proper hiding on non-tab pages, and smooth skeleton-to-content transitions using AnimatePresence.
